title: Student Management System
description: My first backend project: a standalone Java and MySQL-based student management system built for local use, with layered architecture, validated CRUD operations, search functionality, and SQL reporting.

title: SpringMart
description: Demo e-commerce platform built with Spring Boot. Features RESTful CRUD APIs tested with Postman, search functionality, pagination, data validation, image handling, and Docker support, integrated with a frontend built using AI tools.

title: wrkout
description: Workout tracker built for gym-goers following a Push/Pull/Legs (PPL) workout split. Tracks workout progress and helps make daily training more structured and engaging.

title: Shreyan's Arc
description: Interactive DSA roadmap designed to reduce the noise of large question banks. Guides first-time learners through core problem-solving patterns in a structured sequence, while also serving as a revision tool for technical interview preparation.

title: J-Void
description: Java-based DSA practice platform built for focused problem-solving. Integrates with the "Shreyan's Arc" roadmap and provides direct LeetCode links for quick problem submissions.

title: WealthWise
description: Custom portfolio website built for a financial advisor to establish an online presence, showcase their services, and improve client outreach.
